overall_assessment: pi-observational-memory inverts when memory work happens: maintains an append-only ledger (observations+reflections) during the session via 3 background agents, then renders deterministically at compaction with NO model call. Architecturally mature, code-verified. Most reusable pattern: ledger-as-truth + fold-on-read + model-free compaction render. Residual risk: coverage-tier is a structural proxy for semantic safety, not a guarantee; historical coverage not repaired.

key_conclusions.conclusion: Ledger-centered event sourcing: branch-local append-only ledger is the single source of truth; memory state reconstructed by folding, never mutated. coversUpToId (watermark) deliberately separated from provenance (sourceEntryIds/supportingObservationIds).

Compaction is a deterministic render, not summarization — PROVEN: compaction-hook imports only buildCompactionProjection+renderSummary, no resolveModel/agentLoop/apiKey. Model invoked only earlier during turn_end consolidation.

Model proposes / code disposes: tool-schema-only output (execute closure is sole accumulation channel); normalizeSourceEntryIds/normalizeSupportingObservationIds reject unknown ids; hashId=sha256/12 dedup. Model cannot fabricate provenance.

Coverage-tier (none/partial/strong = 0/1/≥2 reflection support count) is the deterministic pruning safety signal. Dropper sorts strong-coverage-first via lexicographic priority (coverage→relevance→age→order), superior to weighted scoring.

Projection asymmetry (maintenance vs full-fold) amortizes expensive folding: normal compaction holds reflections/drops stable from last full-fold boundary; full fold only when pool≥observationsPoolMaxTokens(20K). visibleProjection reads om.folded details to skip re-fold.
Complementary to ANL-001 pi-ultra-compact: ultra-compress handles material volume (file content), observational-memory handles session semantic coherence. Stackable, not competing.

Residual risk: coverage is a STRUCTURAL proxy for semantic safety, not a guarantee. Reflector does not repair historical coverage (concepts.md:81). Reflection citing real id but not preserving meaning → false strong coverage → unsafe drop. Mitigated by prompt constraints + relevance/age/maxDrops fallback.

recommendations.action: Adopt ledger-as-truth + fold-on-read + model-free compaction render as the core pattern for pi-maestro-flow's session-level memory layer
recommendations.rationale: Moves expensive semantic work before compaction; compaction becomes O(entries) deterministic render. Directly solves slow+lossy compaction.

steps.description: Append-only custom entries (observations/reflections/drops); fold-on-read reducer with first-valid-wins + tombstone drops
steps.verification: foldLedger reconstructs active set from entries; drops excluded from active but recallable

recommendations.action: Adopt model-proposes/code-disposes boundary: tool-schema-only model output + provenance id rejection + content-hash dedup
recommendations.rationale: Correct-by-construction even if model hallucinates; model cannot fabricate provenance.

steps.description: execute closure accumulates into Map; reject unknown source/support ids; hashId(content) dedup
steps.verification: invalid-id proposals rejected, not in ledger

recommendations.action: Adopt coverage-tier (none/partial/strong by support count) as pruning safety signal + lexicographic drop priority (coverage→relevance→age→order)
recommendations.rationale: Deterministic, auditable, no weight tuning; coverage-first guarantees semantic safety structurally.

steps.description: model proposes ids; code re-sorts by coverage→relevance→age; cap at maxDrops
steps.verification: strong-coverage dropped before none-coverage at equal relevance

recommendations.action: Separate progress watermark from provenance (coversUpToId vs sourceEntryIds/supportingObservationIds)
recommendations.rationale: Event-sourcing correctness; conflating progress with causality is a classic anti-pattern.

recommendations.action: Adopt projection asymmetry (maintenance vs full-fold) + visibleProjection caching to amortize fold cost
recommendations.rationale: Avoids full re-fold every compaction; reflections persist across maintenance compactions.

recommendations.action: Layer session-internal observations ledger under existing .workflow/ artifact-level memory (observations=session-scoped auto-capture; .workflow/=cross-session explicit artifacts)
recommendations.rationale: Complementary scopes; compaction render can reuse .workflow/state.json accumulated_context.

recommendations.action: If stronger pruning safety needed than upstream: add reflection quality scoring + periodic coverage audit/repair (upstream does NOT repair historical coverage)
recommendations.rationale: Addresses residual semantic-fidelity proxy risk; upstream explicitly defers this.

steps.description: periodically re-verify reflection→observation semantic fidelity; flag weak support

decision_trail.decision: All 4 focus dimensions + 3 perspectives + Deep Dive; skip CLI delegate (user choice)
decision_trail.reason: comprehensive reference doc; faster with same depth via parallel Explore agents
decision_trail.impact: cross-validation via independent agent contexts instead of CLI subprocesses

decision_trail.decision: user chose 继续深入 all three weak dims (123)
decision_trail.reason: comparison was explicitly selected in scoping; security/performance under-addressed
decision_trail.impact: deepened comparison vs ANL-001 + standard, security trust boundary, performance/drift

decision_trail.decision: pressure pass on model-free compaction + devil's advocate on coverage-tier; confidence 75%→85%
decision_trail.impact: above 80% convergence threshold → proceed to synthesis

residual_risks.risk: coverage-tier is structural proxy, not semantic guarantee — false strong coverage possible if reflection cites real id without preserving meaning
historical coverage not repaired — weak-support reflections persist, active pool may exceed target over long sessions
token estimation ceil(length/4) imprecise for pool budgets
residual_risks.mitigation: self-correcting average in maxDropCountForPool + threshold margins
